serviceAccountJson.title: Service Account JSON
serviceAccountJson.description: Full service account key JSON (contents of the downloaded JSON file from Google Cloud).

subject.title: Subject / impersonated user (optional)
subject.description: User email to impersonate via Google Workspace domain-wide delegation. Required for most Calendar operations.

scopes.title: OAuth scopes (optional)
scopes.description: Optional override for OAuth scopes. Defaults to calendar.

token.title: OAuth Access Token
token.description: Short-lived Google OAuth access token with calendar scope.
